case_title: HERRICK CARVER VS. MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100221803) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARVER, HERRICK , AN INDIVIDUAL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-20-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP, EPIQ GLOBAL BUSINESS TRANSFORMATION SOLUTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP AND EPIQ GLOBAL BUSINESS TRANSFORMATION SOLUTIONS LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED.(302/RBU)
